prohibitions.description: Men must not wear any clothing that is sewn to fit the body — no shirts, trousers, underwear, or sewn garments. Wear the two unsewn white sheets (izar and rida').
Men must not cover their head with anything that rests on it — no hats, caps, or hoods. An umbrella held above the head is permissible.
prohibitions.fidyah: Dam (sacrifice of one sheep) if done intentionally; fidyah of choice if by forgetting

prohibitions.description: Women in Ihram must not cover their face with a niqab or burqa. However, if men are nearby, they may lower their scarf over their face. Women cover their hair normally.
Cutting, shaving, or removing any hair from any part of the body is prohibited, as is clipping nails. This applies to all pilgrims throughout the Ihram state.
prohibitions.fidyah: Fidyah: fast 3 days OR feed 6 poor persons (half saa' each) OR sacrifice one sheep

prohibitions.description: Applying perfume, cologne, or scented products to the body or clothing is prohibited. This includes scented soaps, shampoos, and deodorants. Unscented products are permissible.
Hunting or helping to hunt land animals is prohibited while in Ihram. Sea creatures are permissible.
prohibitions.fidyah: Equivalent sacrifice or food donation to the poor

prohibitions.description: Sexual intercourse invalidates Hajj if it occurs before the first partial release from Ihram (tahallul asghar — after Rami, shaving, and Tawaf al-Ifadah). It is the most serious prohibition.
prohibitions.fidyah: If before tahallul: Hajj is invalid; must continue and repeat next year. Plus: sacrifice one camel. If after tahallul but before tahallul akbar: sacrifice one sheep.

prohibitions.description: Intimate touching of a spouse with desire (even without intercourse) is prohibited. This includes kissing, caressing, and similar acts.
prohibitions.fidyah: Dam if done before tahallul asghar

prohibitions.description: Conducting or witnessing a marriage contract is prohibited while in the state of Ihram.
prohibitions.fidyah: No fidyah; the marriage contract is void

prohibitions.description: Quarreling, arguing, using obscene language, or engaging in sinful behavior is forbidden. Allah says: 'There is to be no sexual relations, no disobedience, and no disputing during Hajj.' (2:197)

options: Feed 6 poor persons (half saa' = ~1.5 kg of staple food each)
fidyah_table.notes: Perform in Makkah or anywhere in the Haram boundary. Can be done during or after Hajj.
For the three violations of: wearing stitched clothes (men), covering head (men), using perfume.

fidyah_table.violation: Missing a Wajib of Hajj (e.g., missing overnight in Mina/Muzdalifah, missing Tawaf al-Wada')
options: Dam: sacrifice one sheep in the Haram boundary
fidyah_table.notes: The Dam (blood) must be shed in Makkah and the meat distributed to the poor there.

options: Hajj is invalidated — continue and repeat next year, plus sacrifice one camel
fidyah_table.notes: Most serious violation. Consult a scholar immediately.

partial_release_stages.name: Al-Tahallul al-Asghar (First / Partial Release)
partial_release_stages.achieved_after: Three acts on 10 Dhul Hijjah: Rami al-Aqabah + Shaving/Cutting Hair + Tawaf al-Ifadah (any two of these according to some scholars)
partial_release_stages.what_becomes_permissible: All Ihram prohibitions are lifted EXCEPT sexual relations
partial_release_stages.notes: Most scholars: performing any two of the three acts achieves partial release.

partial_release_stages.name: Al-Tahallul al-Akbar (Second / Full Release)
partial_release_stages.achieved_after: Completing all three acts: Rami + Shaving + Tawaf al-Ifadah (including Sa'i if not done after Tawaf al-Qudum)
partial_release_stages.what_becomes_permissible: All restrictions lifted including sexual relations
partial_release_stages.notes: Hajj is now fully complete regarding Ihram restrictions.
